Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: fiddles [300042220], lutelike chordophones: bowed [300211800], lutelike chordophones [300224192], chordophones [300041641], sound devices by acoustical characteristics [300041621], sound devices (equipment) [300387677], Sound Devices (hierarchy name) [300041619], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Small, unfretted fiddles, generally with four strings, made in a great variety of shapes and played from the 16th century to the 19th.

Source.Source_ID: 2000030041/Sadie, New Grove Dictionary of Musical Instruments (1984)

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Pequeños fiddles sin trastes, generalmente con cuatro cuerdas, fabricados en una gran variedad de formas y que se tocaron desde el siglo XVI al siglo XIX.
Kleine vedels zonder fretten die meestal vier snaren hadden en in een groot aantal verschillende vormen werden gemaakt. Ze werden bespeeld tussen de 16e en 19e eeuw.
小型不具琴隔的提琴，通常具四根琴弦，形狀多樣，傳用於十六到十九世紀。
Kleine, bundfreie Violine, allgemein mit vier Saiten, in großer Formenvielfalt hergestellt und vom 16. bis zum 19. Jahrhundert gespielt.

Source.Source_ID: 2000030041/Sadie, New Grove Dictionary of Musical Instruments (1984)
2000106166/Nomenclature for Museum Cataloging / Nomenclature pour le catalogage translation project (2016-)
2000030041/Sadie, New Grove Dictionary of Musical Instruments (1984)

Term_Source.Page: Ken Moore, Met., suggested as UF to "kits (fiddles)" at outside review TT, 2/28/92, at AAT.; pochettes

Source.Source_ID: 2000030041/Sadie, New Grove Dictionary of Musical Instruments (1984)
